images.copyright: Fireflies glowing above a stream, Okayama Prefecture, Japan (© tdub303/Getty Images)
images.title: The poetry of vanishing light
images.caption: Fireflies glowing above a stream, Okayama Prefecture, Japan
images.desc: In Okayama Prefecture, when humid air settles over a stream, hotaru—Japan's fireflies—begin signaling. On warm, windless evenings, they often start glowing about two hours after sunset under favorable conditions, inviting silence beside water.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
